proverif_model.model_code:
(* ProVerif model for Matter Level Control Cluster (0x0008) *)
(* Generated from FSM specification in JSON form, corrected for ProVerif 2.05 syntax *)

(* ======================= 1. TYPE DECLARATIONS ======================= *)

type state.
type command.
type endpoint.
type duration.
type level.
type attribute.
type mode.
type feature.
type optionsbitmap.
type frequency.
type uint8.
type uint16.

(* ======================= 2. CHANNEL DECLARATIONS ==================== *)

free c_cmd: channel.              (* Public command channel: attacker can send commands *)
free c_resp: channel.             (* Public response/observation channel *)
free c_int: channel [private].    (* Internal state channel *)

(* ======================= 3. CONSTANT DECLARATIONS =================== *)

(* --- State constants (FSM states) --- *)
const st_IdleOff: state.
const st_IdleOn: state.
const st_LevelTransitionOff: state.
const st_LevelTransitionOnBase: state.
const st_LevelTransitionOnWithOnOff: state.

(* --- Command constants (FSM triggers) --- *)
const cmd_MoveToLevel: command.
const cmd_Move: command.
const cmd_Step: command.
const cmd_Stop: command.
const cmd_MoveToLevelWithOnOff: command.
const cmd_MoveWithOnOff: command.
const cmd_StepWithOnOff: command.
const cmd_StopWithOnOff: command.
const cmd_MoveToClosestFrequency: command.
const cmd_internal_timer_tick: command.

(* --- Attributes (for events/queries only) --- *)
const attr_CurrentLevel: attribute.
const attr_RemainingTime: attribute.
const attr_MinLevel: attribute.
const attr_MaxLevel: attribute.
const attr_CurrentFrequency: attribute.
const attr_MinFrequency: attribute.
const attr_MaxFrequency: attribute.
const attr_OnOffTransitionTime: attribute.
const attr_OnLevel: attribute.
const attr_OnTransitionTime: attribute.
const attr_OffTransitionTime: attribute.
const attr_DefaultMoveRate: attribute.
const attr_Options: attribute.
const attr_StartUpCurrentLevel: attribute.
const attr_FeatureMap: attribute.
const attr_ClusterRevision: attribute.
const attr_OnOff: attribute.
const attr_tempOptions: attribute.

(* --- Boolean-like constants and simple values --- *)
const val_OnOff_TRUE: uint8.
const val_OnOff_FALSE: uint8.

(* Zero values for parameters *)
const zero_uint16: uint16.
const zero_uint8: uint8.

(* Feature flags *)
const feat_FrequencySupported: feature.

(* Move/Step modes, simplified *)
const mode_MoveUp: mode.
const mode_MoveDown: mode.
const mode_StepUp: mode.
const mode_StepDown: mode.

(* Special frequency constant used as "no result" placeholder *)
const fq_none: frequency.

(* Duration constants to approximate RemainingTime > 1 vs == 1 vs == 0 *)
const dur_zero: duration.
const dur_one: duration.       (* models RemainingTime == 1 *)
const dur_gt_one: duration.    (* models RemainingTime > 1 *)

(* ======================= 4. FUNCTION DECLARATIONS =================== *)

(* Abstract helper functions reflecting definitions; arithmetic is abstracted. *)

fun clamp_level(level, level, level): level.                 (* (req, min, max) *)
fun derive_transition_time(uint16, uint16): duration.        (* (TransitionTime, OnOffTransitionTime) *)
fun derive_effective_rate(uint16, uint16): uint16.           (* (Rate, DefaultMoveRate) *)
fun derive_step_duration(uint16, level, level, uint8): duration.
fun compute_step_target(level, mode, uint8, level, level): level.
fun start_level_transition(level, level, duration): level.
fun update_level_during_transition(level, level, duration): level.
fun finalize_level_at_target(level, level, duration): level.
fun setup_continuous_move(mode, uint16): mode.
fun estimate_remaining_time_for_move(mode, uint16): duration.
fun terminate_level_transition(level): level.
fun select_closest_supported_frequency(frequency, frequency, frequency): frequency.
fun is_min_level_reached(level, level): bool.                (* (CurrentLevel, MinLevel) *)
fun FeatureFQ(feature): bool.                                (* interpret FeatureMap bit for frequency *)

(* tempOptions / ExecuteIfOff abstraction *)
fun build_temp_options(optionsbitmap, optionsbitmap, optionsbitmap): optionsbitmap.
fun ExecuteIfOff(optionsbitmap): bool.

(* Simple comparisons for guards, modeled as bool-returning functions. *)
fun gt_duration(duration, duration): bool.
fun eq_duration(duration, duration): bool.
fun gt_uint16(uint16, uint16): bool.
fun eq_uint16(uint16, uint16): bool.
fun eq_uint8(uint8, uint8): bool.
fun eq_level(level, level): bool.
fun ge_level(level, level): bool.
fun le_level(level, level): bool.
fun ge_frequency(frequency, frequency): bool.
fun le_frequency(frequency, frequency): bool.
fun eq_frequency(frequency, frequency): bool.

(* Equality for abstract types used in conditions *)
fun eq_state(state, state): bool.
fun eq_command(command, command): bool.
fun eq_bool(bool, bool): bool.

(* Boolean combinators *)
fun band(bool, bool): bool.
fun bor(bool, bool): bool.

(* Encoded command message type: collect all command parameters in one constructor *)
fun cmdMsg(command, mode, uint8, uint16, level, uint16, uint16, optionsbitmap, optionsbitmap, frequency): bitstring.

(* Accessors (declared for completeness; not used in guards) *)
fun getCmd(bitstring): command.
fun getMode(bitstring): mode.
fun getStepSize(bitstring): uint8.
fun getRate(bitstring): uint16.
fun getLevel(bitstring): level.
fun getTransTime(bitstring): uint16.
fun getOnOffTransTime(bitstring): uint16.
fun getOptionsMask(bitstring): optionsbitmap.
fun getOptionsOverride(bitstring): optionsbitmap.
fun getFrequency(bitstring): frequency.

(* ======================= 5. EVENT DECLARATIONS ====================== *)

event CommandReceived(command, state).
event StateTransition(state, state).
event AttributeChanged(attribute, state).
event TimerTick(state).
event InvalidCommand(command, state).

(* Security property related events *)
event LevelRangeCheck(state).
event BaseCommandWhileOffIgnored(command, state).
event WithOnOffWhileOffExecuted(command, state).
event OnOffCouplingChecked(state).
event FrequencyChange(state).
event TransitionStarted(state).
event TransitionEnded(state).
event ParamRejected(command, state).

(* ======================= 6. QUERY DECLARATIONS ====================== *)

(* CurrentLevel range integrity (approximated via reachability of checks) *)
query event(LevelRangeCheck(st_IdleOn)).
query event(LevelRangeCheck(st_LevelTransitionOnBase)).
query event(LevelRangeCheck(st_LevelTransitionOnWithOnOff)).
query event(LevelRangeCheck(st_LevelTransitionOff)).

(* ExecuteIfOffAffectsBaseCommandsOnly *)
query cmd: command, s: state;
    event(BaseCommandWhileOffIgnored(cmd, s)) ==> event(CommandReceived(cmd, s)).

(* OnOffCouplingAtMinLevelOnlyForWithOnOff *)
query s1: state, s2: state;
    event(StateTransition(s1, s2)) ==> event(OnOffCouplingChecked(s2)).

(* FrequencyConstraintRespect *)
query s: state;
    event(FrequencyChange(s)) ==> event(LevelRangeCheck(s)).

(* TransitionTimerProgress *)
query s: state;
    event(TransitionStarted(s)) ==> event(TransitionEnded(s)).

(* CommandParameterValidation *)
query cmd: command, s: state;
    event(ParamRejected(cmd, s)) ==> event(CommandReceived(cmd, s)).

(* ======================= 7. PROCESS MACRO DEFINITIONS ============== *)

(* Invalid-command branch macro *)
let InvalidCommandBranch(rcmd: command, prevState: state,
                         curState: state,
                         curLevel: level,
                         remTime: duration,
                         minLevel: level,
                         maxLevel: level,
                         curFreq: frequency,
                         minFreq: frequency,
                         maxFreq: frequency,
                         onOff: uint8,
                         options: optionsbitmap,
                         featureFreq: feature) =
    event InvalidCommand(rcmd, prevState);
    DeviceFSM(curState,
              curLevel,
              remTime,
              minLevel, maxLevel,
              curFreq, minFreq, maxFreq,
              onOff, options, featureFreq).

(* FSM encoded as a recursive process carrying abstract state and attributes *)

let DeviceFSM(curState: state,
              curLevel: level,
              remTime: duration,
              minLevel: level,
              maxLevel: level,
              curFreq: frequency,
              minFreq: frequency,
              maxFreq: frequency,
              onOff: uint8,
              options: optionsbitmap,
              featureFreq: feature) =

    (* Invariant monitoring (abstract) *)
    event AttributeChanged(attr_CurrentLevel, curState);
    event AttributeChanged(attr_RemainingTime, curState);
    event AttributeChanged(attr_OnOff, curState);
    event LevelRangeCheck(curState);

    (* Receive a command message as a single bitstring, then destructure *)
    in(c_cmd, m: bitstring);
    let cmdMsg(rcmd: command,
               rmode: mode,
               rStepSize: uint8,
               rRate: uint16,
               rLevel: level,
               rTransTime: uint16,
               rOnOffTransTime: uint16,
               rOptionsMask: optionsbitmap,
               rOptionsOverride: optionsbitmap,
               rFrequency: frequency) = m in

    event CommandReceived(rcmd, curState);

    let tempOpt: optionsbitmap = build_temp_options(options, rOptionsMask, rOptionsOverride) in

    (* Distinguish timer tick from other commands *)
    if eq_command(rcmd, cmd_internal_timer_tick) then
        (
            (* ================= TIMER TICK BEHAVIOR ================= *)
            event TimerTick(curState);

            if band(eq_state(curState, st_LevelTransitionOnBase), eq_duration(remTime, dur_gt_one)) then
                (
                    (* Base transition on, RemainingTime > 1 *)
                    let newRem: duration = dur_one in
                    let newLevel: level = update_level_during_transition(curLevel, curLevel, remTime) in
                    DeviceFSM(st_LevelTransitionOnBase,
                              newLevel,
                              newRem,
                              minLevel, maxLevel,
                              curFreq, minFreq, maxFreq,
                              onOff, options, featureFreq)
                )
            else if band(eq_state(curState, st_LevelTransitionOnBase), eq_duration(remTime, dur_one)) then
                (
                    (* Completion of base transition while on *)
                    let finalLevel: level = finalize_level_at_target(curLevel, curLevel, remTime) in
                    event TransitionEnded(st_LevelTransitionOnBase);
                    event StateTransition(st_LevelTransitionOnBase, st_IdleOn);
                    event OnOffCouplingChecked(st_IdleOn);
                    DeviceFSM(st_IdleOn,
                              finalLevel,
                              dur_zero,
                              minLevel, maxLevel,
                              curFreq, minFreq, maxFreq,
                              onOff, options, featureFreq)
                )
            else if band(eq_state(curState, st_LevelTransitionOnWithOnOff), eq_duration(remTime, dur_gt_one)) then
                (
                    (* WithOnOff transition on, RemainingTime > 1 *)
                    let newRem2: duration = dur_one in
                    let newLevel2: level = update_level_during_transition(curLevel, curLevel, remTime) in
                    DeviceFSM(st_LevelTransitionOnWithOnOff,
                              newLevel2,
                              newRem2,
                              minLevel, maxLevel,
                              curFreq, minFreq, maxFreq,
                              onOff, options, featureFreq)
                )
            else if band(eq_state(curState, st_LevelTransitionOnWithOnOff), eq_duration(remTime, dur_one)) then
                (
                    (* Completion of WithOnOff transition while on *)
                    let finalLevel2: level = finalize_level_at_target(curLevel, curLevel, remTime) in
                    event TransitionEnded(st_LevelTransitionOnWithOnOff);
                    if is_min_level_reached(finalLevel2, minLevel) then
                        (
                            event StateTransition(st_LevelTransitionOnWithOnOff, st_IdleOff);
                            event OnOffCouplingChecked(st_IdleOff);
                            DeviceFSM(st_IdleOff,
                                      finalLevel2,
                                      dur_zero,
                                      minLevel, maxLevel,
                                      curFreq, minFreq, maxFreq,
                                      val_OnOff_FALSE,
                                      options, featureFreq)
                        )
                    else
                        (
                            event StateTransition(st_LevelTransitionOnWithOnOff, st_IdleOn);
                            event OnOffCouplingChecked(st_IdleOn);
                            DeviceFSM(st_IdleOn,
                                      finalLevel2,
                                      dur_zero,
                                      minLevel, maxLevel,
                                      curFreq, minFreq, maxFreq,
                                      onOff,
                                      options, featureFreq)
                        )
                )
            else if band(eq_state(curState, st_LevelTransitionOff), eq_duration(remTime, dur_gt_one)) then
                (
                    (* Transition while off, RemainingTime > 1 *)
                    let newRem3: duration = dur_one in
                    let newLevel3: level = update_level_during_transition(curLevel, curLevel, remTime) in
                    DeviceFSM(st_LevelTransitionOff,
                              newLevel3,
                              newRem3,
                              minLevel, maxLevel,
                              curFreq, minFreq, maxFreq,
                              onOff,
                              options, featureFreq)
                )
            else if band(eq_state(curState, st_LevelTransitionOff), eq_duration(remTime, dur_one)) then
                (
                    (* Completion while off *)
                    let finalLevel3: level = finalize_level_at_target(curLevel, curLevel, remTime) in
                    event TransitionEnded(st_LevelTransitionOff);
                    event StateTransition(st_LevelTransitionOff, st_IdleOff);
                    event OnOffCouplingChecked(st_IdleOff);
                    DeviceFSM(st_IdleOff,
                              finalLevel3,
                              dur_zero,
                              minLevel, maxLevel,
                              curFreq, minFreq, maxFreq,
                              onOff,
                              options, featureFreq)
                )
            else
                (
                    (* No relevant transition: stay unchanged *)
                    DeviceFSM(curState,
                              curLevel,
                              remTime,
                              minLevel, maxLevel,
                              curFreq, minFreq, maxFreq,
                              onOff, options, featureFreq)
                )
        )
    else
        (
            (* ================= NON-TIMER COMMANDS ================= *)

            (* --- CommandParameterValidation --- *)

            if band(bor(eq_command(rcmd, cmd_Move), eq_command(rcmd, cmd_MoveWithOnOff)),
                    eq_uint16(rRate, zero_uint16)) then
                (
                    (* Move / MoveWithOnOff with Rate == 0 *)
                    event ParamRejected(rcmd, curState);
                    InvalidCommandBranch(rcmd, curState,
                                         curState, curLevel, remTime,
                                         minLevel, maxLevel,
                                         curFreq, minFreq, maxFreq,
                                         onOff, options, featureFreq)
                )
            else if band(bor(eq_command(rcmd, cmd_Step), eq_command(rcmd, cmd_StepWithOnOff)),
                         eq_uint8(rStepSize, zero_uint8)) then
                (
                    (* Step / StepWithOnOff with StepSize == 0 *)
                    event ParamRejected(rcmd, curState);
                    InvalidCommandBranch(rcmd, curState,
                                         curState, curLevel, remTime,
                                         minLevel, maxLevel,
                                         curFreq, minFreq, maxFreq,
                                         onOff, options, featureFreq)
                )
            else if band(
                        band(
                            bor(eq_command(rcmd, cmd_MoveToLevel),
                                bor(eq_command(rcmd, cmd_Move),
                                    eq_command(rcmd, cmd_Step))),
                            eq_uint8(onOff, val_OnOff_FALSE)),
                        eq_bool(ExecuteIfOff(tempOpt), false)) then
                (
                    (* ExecuteIfOffAffectsBaseCommandsOnly: base cmds ignored when off & ExecuteIfOff FALSE *)
                    event BaseCommandWhileOffIgnored(rcmd, curState);
                    InvalidCommandBranch(rcmd, curState,
                                         curState, curLevel, remTime,
                                         minLevel, maxLevel,
                                         curFreq, minFreq, maxFreq,
                                         onOff, options, featureFreq)
                )
            else if band(eq_command(rcmd, cmd_MoveToClosestFrequency),
                         eq_bool(FeatureFQ(featureFreq), true)) then
                (
                    (* FrequencyConstraintRespect: MoveToClosestFrequency with feature present *)
                    let newFreq: frequency = select_closest_supported_frequency(rFrequency, minFreq, maxFreq) in
                    if eq_frequency(newFreq, fq_none) then
                        (
                            (* Higher layers would signal CONSTRAINT_ERROR; here no state change. *)
                            event InvalidCommand(rcmd, curState);
                            DeviceFSM(curState,
                                      curLevel,
                                      remTime,
                                      minLevel, maxLevel,
                                      curFreq, minFreq, maxFreq,
                                      onOff, options, featureFreq)
                        )
                    else
                        (
                            event FrequencyChange(curState);
                            if band(ge_frequency(newFreq, minFreq), le_frequency(newFreq, maxFreq)) then
                                DeviceFSM(curState,
                                          curLevel,
                                          remTime,
                                          minLevel, maxLevel,
                                          newFreq, minFreq, maxFreq,
                                          onOff, options, featureFreq)
                            else
                                DeviceFSM(curState,
                                          curLevel,
                                          remTime,
                                          minLevel, maxLevel,
                                          curFreq, minFreq, maxFreq,
                                          onOff, options, featureFreq)
                        )
                )
            else if bor(eq_command(rcmd, cmd_MoveToLevelWithOnOff),
                        bor(eq_command(rcmd, cmd_MoveWithOnOff),
                            eq_command(rcmd, cmd_StepWithOnOff))) then
                (
                    (* WithOnOff variants: allowed even when off *)
                    event WithOnOffWhileOffExecuted(rcmd, curState);
                    event TransitionStarted(curState);
                    event OnOffCouplingChecked(curState);
                    let effTime_wo: duration = derive_transition_time(rTransTime, rOnOffTransTime) in
                    if eq_uint8(onOff, val_OnOff_FALSE) then
                        DeviceFSM(st_LevelTransitionOnWithOnOff,
                                  curLevel,
                                  effTime_wo,
                                  minLevel, maxLevel,
                                  curFreq, minFreq, maxFreq,
                                  val_OnOff_TRUE,
                                  options, featureFreq)
                    else
                        DeviceFSM(st_LevelTransitionOnWithOnOff,
                                  curLevel,
                                  effTime_wo,
                                  minLevel, maxLevel,
                                  curFreq, minFreq, maxFreq,
                                  onOff,
                                  options, featureFreq)
                )
            else if bor(eq_command(rcmd, cmd_Stop), eq_command(rcmd, cmd_StopWithOnOff)) then
                (
                    (* Stop / StopWithOnOff: terminate any in-progress transition or be no-op when idle *)
                    event TransitionEnded(curState);
                    event OnOffCouplingChecked(curState);
                    if band(eq_state(curState, st_LevelTransitionOnBase),
                            eq_uint8(onOff, val_OnOff_TRUE)) then
                        (
                            event StateTransition(st_LevelTransitionOnBase, st_IdleOn);
                            DeviceFSM(st_IdleOn,
                                      terminate_level_transition(curLevel),
                                      dur_zero,
                                      minLevel, maxLevel,
                                      curFreq, minFreq, maxFreq,
                                      onOff, options, featureFreq)
                        )
                    else if band(eq_state(curState, st_LevelTransitionOnWithOnOff),
                                 eq_uint8(onOff, val_OnOff_TRUE)) then
                        (
                            event StateTransition(st_LevelTransitionOnWithOnOff, st_IdleOn);
                            DeviceFSM(st_IdleOn,
                                      terminate_level_transition(curLevel),
                                      dur_zero,
                                      minLevel, maxLevel,
                                      curFreq, minFreq, maxFreq,
                                      onOff, options, featureFreq)
                        )
                    else if band(eq_state(curState, st_LevelTransitionOff),
                                 eq_uint8(onOff, val_OnOff_FALSE)) then
                        (
                            event StateTransition(st_LevelTransitionOff, st_IdleOff);
                            DeviceFSM(st_IdleOff,
                                      terminate_level_transition(curLevel),
                                      dur_zero,
                                      minLevel, maxLevel,
                                      curFreq, minFreq, maxFreq,
                                      onOff, options, featureFreq)
                        )
                    else
                        (
                            (* Stop when idle: no effect, modeled as invalid/ignored *)
                            InvalidCommandBranch(rcmd, curState,
                                                 curState, curLevel, remTime,
                                                 minLevel, maxLevel,
                                                 curFreq, minFreq, maxFreq,
                                                 onOff, options, featureFreq)
                        )
                )
            else if eq_command(rcmd, cmd_MoveToLevel) then
                (
                    (* MoveToLevel base command *)
                    event TransitionStarted(curState);
                    event OnOffCouplingChecked(curState);
                    let tgtLevel: level = clamp_level(rLevel, minLevel, maxLevel) in
                    let effTime: duration = derive_transition_time(rTransTime, rOnOffTransTime) in
                    if eq_uint8(onOff, val_OnOff_TRUE) then
                        DeviceFSM(st_LevelTransitionOnBase,
                                  start_level_transition(curLevel, tgtLevel, effTime),
                                  effTime,
                                  minLevel, maxLevel,
                                  curFreq, minFreq, maxFreq,
                                  onOff, options, featureFreq)
                    else
                        DeviceFSM(st_LevelTransitionOff,
                                  start_level_transition(curLevel, tgtLevel, effTime),
                                  effTime,
                                  minLevel, maxLevel,
                                  curFreq, minFreq, maxFreq,
                                  onOff, options, featureFreq)
                )
            else if eq_command(rcmd, cmd_Move) then
                (
                    (* Move base command: continuous move toward limit *)
                    event TransitionStarted(curState);
                    event OnOffCouplingChecked(curState);
                    let effRate: uint16 = derive_effective_rate(rRate, zero_uint16) in
                    let _m: mode = setup_continuous_move(rmode, effRate) in
                    let estTime: duration = estimate_remaining_time_for_move(rmode, effRate) in
                    if eq_uint8(onOff, val_OnOff_TRUE) then
                        DeviceFSM(st_LevelTransitionOnBase,
                                  curLevel,
                                  estTime,
                                  minLevel, maxLevel,
                                  curFreq, minFreq, maxFreq,
                                  onOff, options, featureFreq)
                    else
                        DeviceFSM(st_LevelTransitionOff,
                                  curLevel,
                                  estTime,
                                  minLevel, maxLevel,
                                  curFreq, minFreq, maxFreq,
                                  onOff, options, featureFreq)
                )
            else if eq_command(rcmd, cmd_Step) then
                (
                    (* Step base command *)
                    event TransitionStarted(curState);
                    event OnOffCouplingChecked(curState);
                    let tgt2: level = compute_step_target(curLevel, rmode, rStepSize, minLevel, maxLevel) in
                    let stepTime: duration = derive_step_duration(rTransTime, curLevel, tgt2, rStepSize) in
                    if eq_uint8(onOff, val_OnOff_TRUE) then
                        DeviceFSM(st_LevelTransitionOnBase,
                                  start_level_transition(curLevel, tgt2, stepTime),
                                  stepTime,
                                  minLevel, maxLevel,
                                  curFreq, minFreq, maxFreq,
                                  onOff, options, featureFreq)
                    else
                        DeviceFSM(st_LevelTransitionOff,
                                  start_level_transition(curLevel, tgt2, stepTime),
                                  stepTime,
                                  minLevel, maxLevel,
                                  curFreq, minFreq, maxFreq,
                                  onOff, options, featureFreq)
                )
            else
                (
                    (* Any other command not explicitly modeled: invalid or ignored *)
                    InvalidCommandBranch(rcmd, curState,
                                         curState, curLevel, remTime,
                                         minLevel, maxLevel,
                                         curFreq, minFreq, maxFreq,
                                         onOff, options, featureFreq)
                )
        ).

(* ======================= 8. MAIN PROCESS ============================ *)

process
    (* Initialize attributes to abstract constants; specific values not modeled. *)
    new initLevel: level;
    new initMinLevel: level;
    new initMaxLevel: level;
    new initFreq: frequency;
    new initMinFreq: frequency;
    new initMaxFreq: frequency;
    let initRemTime: duration = dur_zero in
    new initOptions: optionsbitmap;
    let initOnOff: uint8 = val_OnOff_FALSE in
    out(c_int, st_IdleOff);
    (!DeviceFSM(st_IdleOff,
                initLevel,
                initRemTime,
                initMinLevel,
                initMaxLevel,
                initFreq,
                initMinFreq,
                initMaxFreq,
                initOnOff,
                initOptions,
                feat_FrequencySupported)).
